description_long: This is a large, rustic log cabin with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in brown shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from thick, horizontally stacked logs, giving it a traditional and sturdy appearance. Multiple covered porches and overhangs are supported by exposed timber beams, adding to the architectural detail. The cabin features a variety of window sizes, including large, multi-pane windows and smaller, single-pane ones, arranged asymmetrically across the facades. Stonework is visible at the base, providing a solid foundation and enhancing the natural aesthetic. The overall design suggests a luxurious mountain or woodland retreat, blending natural materials with spacious, inviting forms.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a multi-gabled shingle roof, exposed timber beams, and stone foundation, featuring asymmetrical windows and covered porches.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance, prominent gabled rooflines, and a spacious covered porch supported by timber beams.
description_view_1: This side view shows the depth of the cabin, the stone foundation, and a series of windows beneath the extended roof, with less visible porch detail.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional gabled sections, more windows, and the full length of the cabin, emphasizing its expansive layout.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on a secondary entrance and porch area, with visible log construction and a smaller roof overhang.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with intersecting gables, deep overhangs, and brown shingle covering; exposed timber beams and dormer-like projections
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical distribution of windows, including large multi-pane windows and smaller single-pane windows, grouped in clusters and individually, with some beneath porch overhangs
attribute_door_placement: main entrance door centered on the front facade beneath the largest gable, secondary door visible on the side beneath a smaller porch overhang
